Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class BotVariableOperand

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.BotVariableOperand
public class BotVariableOperand extends Object

Java class for BotVariableOperand complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="BotVariableOperand">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="disableAutoFill" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationVariableOperandSourceType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="targetType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationVariableType"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
